requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3, IMDG Sea Freight and Class 9 Dangerous Goods (Kenya)
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3、IMDG海运及第9类危险货物（肯尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3、IMDG海運及第9類危險貨物（肯亞）

summary.en: Lithium batteries (cells, packs, power banks) are dangerous goods for transport. The universal gate is the UN 38.3 test report (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) — required regardless of origin or destination before transport. Most China-Kenya battery cargo moves by sea to the Port of Mombasa, so the IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) governs: lithium-ion cells/batteries are UN 3480, batteries packed with or in equipment are UN 3481, classified as Class 9 (miscellaneous dangerous goods), with IMDG packing, marking, labelling and the dangerous-goods declaration. For air freight into Kenya, IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) and ICAO Technical Instructions apply, including the 30% state-of-charge limit for loose lithium-ion cells/batteries shipped as cargo. Kenya, as IMO and ICAO contracting state, applies these international instruments; KEBS PVoC additionally checks that consignments carry valid UN 38.3 evidence. There is no separate Kenya-specific transport test beyond the international UN/IMDG/IATA regime.
summary.zh: 锂电池（电芯、电池组、移动电源）在运输上属危险货物。普遍性门槛是UN 38.3测试报告（联合国危险货物运输试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）——无论产地或目的地，运输前均须持有。中肯电池货物多经海运至蒙巴萨港，故适用IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）：锂离子电芯/电池为UN 3480，随附设备包装或装入设备的电池为UN 3481，归为第9类（杂类危险品），并须符合IMDG包装、标识、标签及危险货物申报。空运至肯尼亚时适用IATA危险品规则（DGR）及ICAO技术细则，包括散装锂离子电芯/电池作为货物运输时30%荷电状态限制。肯尼亚作为IMO和ICAO缔约国适用上述国际文书；KEBS PVoC另会核查货物持有有效UN 38.3证据。除国际UN/IMDG/IATA制度外，肯尼亚无单独的特定运输测试。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（電芯、電池組、行動電源）在運輸上屬危險貨物。普遍性門檻是UN 38.3測試報告（聯合國危險貨物運輸試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）——無論產地或目的地，運輸前均須持有。中肯電池貨物多經海運至蒙巴薩港，故適用IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）：鋰離子電芯/電池為UN 3480，隨附設備包裝或裝入設備的電池為UN 3481，歸為第9類（雜類危險品），並須符合IMDG包裝、標識、標籤及危險貨物申報。空運至肯亞時適用IATA危險品規則（DGR）及ICAO技術細則，包括散裝鋰離子電芯/電池作為貨物運輸時30%荷電狀態限制。肯亞作為IMO和ICAO締約國適用上述國際文書；KEBS PVoC另會核查貨物持有有效UN 38.3證據。除國際UN/IMDG/IATA制度外，肯亞無單獨的特定運輸測試。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code — International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code, Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 (sea freight to Mombasa)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR), current edition — Section 3.9 (UN 3480 / UN 3481) for air freight
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air (Doc 9284)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for all lithium batteries transported by air, consistent with ICAO and CAAC (Civil Aviation Administration of China) requirements. For sea export — the dominant China-Kenya mode — the IMDG Code applies at origin (Chinese ports) exactly as at destination, so Chinese exporters shipping by sea already operate within the same international IMDG framework. Domestic road transport in China uses GB 12268 (Dangerous Goods List) and JT/T 617. Because UN 38.3 and IMDG are international, a properly prepared Chinese sea shipment is largely aligned with what Kenya requires on arrival.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有空运锂电池持有UN 38.3测试报告，符合ICAO及中国民用航空局（CAAC）要求。对于海运出口——中肯主要运输方式——起运地（中国港口）与目的地同样适用IMDG规则，故海运出口商已在同一国际IMDG框架内运作。中国国内道路运输适用GB 12268（危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617。由于UN 38.3和IMDG为国际通用，妥善准备的中国海运货物与肯尼亚到货要求基本一致。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有空運鋰電池持有UN 38.3測試報告，符合ICAO及中國民用航空局（CAAC）要求。對於海運出口——中肯主要運輸方式——起運地（中國港口）與目的地同樣適用IMDG規則，故海運出口商已在同一國際IMDG框架內運作。中國國內道路運輸適用GB 12268（危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617。由於UN 38.3和IMDG為國際通用，妥善準備的中國海運貨物與肯亞到貨要求基本一致。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — required by CAAC for air transport and recognised internationally
IMDG Code — applied at Chinese ports for sea export (same international instrument as at Mombasa)
GB 12268-2012 / JT/T 617-2018 — domestic China road transport classification and requirements

gap.en: Transport is the most aligned area, because UN 38.3 and IMDG/IATA are international instruments that both China and Kenya apply — a compliant Chinese sea shipment to Mombasa is largely on the same regime it left China under. Residual gaps are practical: (1) the UN 38.3 report must be from an accredited laboratory and cover the exact cell/pack configuration and the 100 Wh / 2 g lithium thresholds being shipped; (2) IMDG packing, UN 3480/3481 marking, Class 9 labelling, packing instructions (P903/P909 etc.) and the dangerous-goods declaration must be correct for the Mombasa sea route; (3) for any air leg, IATA DGR state-of-charge (≤30% for loose cells as cargo) and quantity limits apply; (4) KEBS PVoC will look for valid UN 38.3 evidence as part of the conformity file, so the same report supports both transport and PVoC. No Kenya-specific transport test exists beyond the international regime.
gap.zh: 运输是最一致的领域，因为UN 38.3和IMDG/IATA为中肯均适用的国际文书——合规的中国海运货物到蒙巴萨基本沿用其离开中国时的同一制度。残余差距属实务层面：（1）UN 38.3报告须来自认可实验室，且涵盖出口的确切电芯/电池组配置及100 Wh/2 g锂含量阈值；（2）蒙巴萨海运路线须正确执行IMDG包装、UN 3480/3481标识、第9类标签、包装规范（P903/P909等）及危险货物申报；（3）任何空运段适用IATA DGR荷电状态（散装电芯作为货物≤30%）及数量限制；（4）KEBS PVoC会将有效UN 38.3证据纳入符合性文件，故同一报告同时支持运输与PVoC。除国际制度外不存在肯尼亚特定运输测试。
gap.zht: 運輸是最一致的領域，因為UN 38.3和IMDG/IATA為中肯均適用的國際文書——合規的中國海運貨物到蒙巴薩基本沿用其離開中國時的同一制度。殘餘差距屬實務層面：（1）UN 38.3報告須來自認可實驗室，且涵蓋出口的確切電芯/電池組配置及100 Wh/2 g鋰含量閾值；（2）蒙巴薩海運路線須正確執行IMDG包裝、UN 3480/3481標識、第9類標籤、包裝規範（P903/P909等）及危險貨物申報；（3）任何空運段適用IATA DGR荷電狀態（散裝電芯作為貨物≤30%）及數量限制；（4）KEBS PVoC會將有效UN 38.3證據納入符合性文件，故同一報告同時支持運輸與PVoC。除國際制度外不存在肯亞特定運輸測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all transport modes; IMDG Code Class 9 (UN 3480/3481) for sea freight to Mombasa; IATA DGR state-of-charge and quantity limits for any air freight; Kenya applies these as an IMO/ICAO contracting state and KEBS PVoC checks UN 38.3 evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required by CAAC for air transport; IMDG applied for sea export at Chinese ports; GB 12268 / JT/T 617 for domestic road transport

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport is the most aligned domain: UN 38.3 plus IMDG (sea to Mombasa) or IATA DGR (air) are international instruments applied by both China and Kenya, so a compliant Chinese shipment largely meets Kenyan arrival requirements on the same regime. The same UN 38.3 report also supports the KEBS PVoC conformity file. Remaining gaps are practical — accredited UN 38.3 coverage of the exact configuration, correct IMDG/Class 9 documentation for the Mombasa route, and air-leg state-of-charge limits.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输是最一致的领域：UN 38.3加IMDG（海运至蒙巴萨）或IATA DGR（空运）为中肯均适用的国际文书，故合规的中国货物在同一制度下基本满足肯尼亚到货要求。同一UN 38.3报告还支持KEBS PVoC符合性文件。残余差距属实务——认可的UN 38.3须涵盖确切配置、蒙巴萨路线须正确的IMDG/第9类文件、以及空运段荷电状态限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸是最一致的領域：UN 38.3加IMDG（海運至蒙巴薩）或IATA DGR（空運）為中肯均適用的國際文書，故合規的中國貨物在同一制度下基本滿足肯亞到貨要求。同一UN 38.3報告還支持KEBS PVoC符合性文件。殘餘差距屬實務——認可的UN 38.3須涵蓋確切配置、蒙巴薩路線須正確的IMDG/第9類文件、以及空運段荷電狀態限制。
